articles.title: Alien Whistleblower Claims US Has 'Dismembered Gray Bodies' Hidden Inside Underground Military Bases
articles.summary: Investigative writer Timothy Alberino claimed that the U.S. government has recovered alien bodies and hides them in underground military bases, according to an interview on the platform Redacted. He said that crash‑retrieval operations involving non‑human craft and bodies are conducted outside the oversight of elected officials and are controlled by private aerospace contractors and highly compartmentalised defence programmes. Alberino referenced anecdotal eyewitness accounts of “gray aliens” at alleged retrieval sites, describing dismembered bodies and transparent fluids, and cited former intelligence official David Grusch’s 2023 testimony that the U.S. had recovered “non‑human biologics.” No publicly available evidence has been produced to substantiate Alberino’s allegations, and U.S. defence agencies have not confirmed the existence of such programmes. Congressional interest in UAP investigations remains high, with lawmakers calling for greater transparency, but the Pentagon maintains that its All‑domain Anomaly Resolution Office has not produced verified evidence of extraterrestrial activity.

en.title: Alien Whistleblower Claims US Has 'Dismembered Gray Bodies' Hidden Inside Underground Military Bases
en.summary: Investigative writer Timothy Alberino claimed that the U.S. government has recovered alien bodies and hides them in underground military bases, according to an interview on the platform Redacted. He said that crash‑retrieval operations involving non‑human craft and bodies are conducted outside the oversight of elected officials and are controlled by private aerospace contractors and highly compartmentalised defence programmes.

de.title: Außerirdischer Whistleblower behauptet, die USA hätten „graue Körper zerstückelt“, die in unterirdischen Militärstützpunkten versteckt seien
de.summary: Laut einem Interview auf der Plattform Redacted behauptete der investigative Autor Timothy Alberino, die US-Regierung habe außerirdische Leichen geborgen und sie in unterirdischen Militärstützpunkten versteckt. Er sagte, dass Bergungsoperationen nach Unfällen mit nichtmenschlichen Fahrzeugen und Leichen außerhalb der Aufsicht gewählter Beamter durchgeführt und von privaten Luft- und Raumfahrtunternehmen und stark abgeschotteten Verteidigungsprogrammen kontrolliert würden.

articles.title: UAP whistleblower: Pilots are ‘still having' these encounters
articles.summary: Former Navy F‑18 pilot Ryan Graves, who has called himself a UAP whistleblower, spoke on Fox News’ “The Big Weekend Show” about the Pentagon’s release of UFO and UAP footage. Graves said the footage shows pilots still encountering unidentified aerial phenomena. The segment was part of Fox News Channel’s coverage, which includes news reporting, opinion and analysis. The article does not provide further details on the content of the footage or the Pentagon’s response.

en.title: UAP whistleblower: Pilots are ‘still having' these encounters
en.summary: Former Navy F‑18 pilot Ryan Graves, who has called himself a UAP whistleblower, spoke on Fox News’ “The Big Weekend Show” about the Pentagon’s release of UFO and UAP footage. Graves said the footage shows pilots still encountering unidentified aerial phenomena. The segment was part of Fox News Channel’s coverage, which includes news reporting, opinion and analysis.

de.title: UAP-Whistleblower: Piloten haben diese Begegnungen „immer noch“.
de.summary: Der ehemalige Navy-F-18-Pilot Ryan Graves, der sich selbst als UAP-Whistleblower bezeichnet hat, sprach in der Sendung „The Big Weekend Show“ von Fox News über die Veröffentlichung von UFO- und UAP-Aufnahmen durch das Pentagon. Graves sagte, das Filmmaterial zeige, wie Piloten immer noch auf unbekannte Luftphänomene stoßen. Das Segment war Teil der Berichterstattung des Fox News Channel, die Nachrichtenberichterstattung, Meinungen und Analysen umfasst.

articles.title: Secret agent, who was about to blow the lid off UFO secrets, died 5 years ago. A whistleblower has now raised suspicion
articles.summary: Kevin Childress, a 30‑year Department of Energy criminal investigator, died unexpectedly in 2021 at his Georgia home, with authorities citing complications from COVID‑19. UFO whistleblower Luis Elizondo claims Childress was healthy before his death and had warned that the DOE had a significant role in UAP programs. Elizondo says the DOE is trying to silence him and notes that no public autopsy or detailed cause of death has been released. The FBI is investigating a series of missing and dead scientists linked to secret nuclear and UFO programs, including the disappearance of retired General William Neil McCasland. Other scientists, such as David Wilcock, have also died under suspicious circumstances, adding to the pattern of unexplained losses.

en.title: Secret agent, who was about to blow the lid off UFO secrets, died 5 years ago. A whistleblower has now raised suspicion
en.summary: Kevin Childress, a 30‑year Department of Energy criminal investigator, died unexpectedly in 2021 at his Georgia home, with authorities citing complications from COVID‑19. UFO whistleblower Luis Elizondo claims Childress was healthy before his death and had warned that the DOE had a significant role in UAP programs. Elizondo says the DOE is trying to silence him and notes that no public autopsy or detailed cause of death has been released.

de.title: Der Geheimagent, der UFO-Geheimnisse enthüllen wollte, starb vor fünf Jahren. Ein Whistleblower hat nun Verdacht geäußert
de.summary: Kevin Childress, ein 30-jähriger Kriminalermittler des Energieministeriums, starb 2021 unerwartet in seinem Haus in Georgia, wobei die Behörden Komplikationen durch COVID-19 anführten. UFO-Whistleblower Luis Elizondo behauptet, Childress sei vor seinem Tod gesund gewesen und habe gewarnt, dass das DOE eine wichtige Rolle in UAP-Programmen gespielt habe. Elizondo sagt, das Energieministerium versuche ihn zum Schweigen zu bringen und stellt fest, dass weder eine öffentliche Autopsie noch eine detaillierte Todesursache veröffentlicht wurden.

articles.title: Former Pentagon-Linked Physicist Alleges the United States Has Retrieved Biological Remains From Four Types of Alien Life Forms
articles.summary: Hal Puthoff, a former CIA‑funded physicist, claimed on a podcast that the United States may have recovered four distinct alien species from crashed UFOs, though he has not seen the evidence himself. His remarks echo earlier testimony by former Air Force intelligence officer David Grusch, who said the U.S. possessed “non‑human biologics” from unidentified anomalous phenomena crash sites. Puthoff’s associate Eric Davis described the recovered beings in intelligence reports as “gray,” “Nordic,” “insect‑like,” and “reptilian,” all humanoid with two arms and two legs, but no detailed evidence was provided. The documentary “The Age of Disclosure,” directed by Dan Farah, features interviews with military officials, intelligence figures, and political leaders discussing alleged UAP encounters, government secrecy, and a supposed secret “Legacy Program.” Despite these claims, no verified public evidence has emerged, and U.S. officials continue to state that there is no confirmed evidence linking UAP sightings to extraterrestrial origins.

en.summary: Hal Puthoff, a former CIA‑funded physicist, claimed on a podcast that the United States may have recovered four distinct alien species from crashed UFOs, though he has not seen the evidence himself. His remarks echo earlier testimony by former Air Force intelligence officer David Grusch, who said the U.S. possessed “non‑human biologics” from unidentified anomalous phenomena crash sites.

de.title: Ehemaliger mit dem Pentagon verbundener Physiker behauptet, die Vereinigten Staaten hätten biologische Überreste von vier Arten außerirdischer Lebensformen geborgen
de.summary: Hal Puthoff, ein ehemaliger von der CIA finanzierter Physiker, behauptete in einem Podcast, dass die Vereinigten Staaten möglicherweise vier verschiedene außerirdische Arten aus abgestürzten UFOs geborgen hätten, obwohl er die Beweise selbst nicht gesehen hat. Seine Äußerungen spiegeln frühere Aussagen des ehemaligen Geheimdienstoffiziers der Luftwaffe, David Grusch, wider, der sagte, die USA besäßen „nichtmenschliche Biologika“ von nicht identifizierten Absturzstellen mit anomalen Phänomenen.

articles.title: Department of War Publishes Second Release of Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena Files on WAR.GOV/UFO
articles.summary: The Department of War says it is publishing the second release of declassified and historical Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena files as part of the Presidential Unsealing and Reporting System for UAP Encounters, or PURSUE. The release states that the collection remains housed on WAR.GOV/UFO and that additional files will be released on a rolling basis. Assistant to the Secretary of War for Public Affairs and Chief Pentagon Spokesman Sean Parnell is named as the source of the statement. The Department says WAR.GOV/UFO has received over 1 billion hits worldwide since its May 8, 2026 launch, which it frames as evidence of major public interest in the topic and in the Trump administration's transparency effort. The statement adds that the Department of War and agency partners are working on a third UAP file release, which will be announced in the near future.

en.title: Department of War Publishes Second Release of Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena Files on WAR.GOV/UFO
en.summary: The Department of War says it is publishing the second release of declassified and historical Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena files as part of the Presidential Unsealing and Reporting System for UAP Encounters, or PURSUE. The release states that the collection remains housed on WAR.GOV/UFO and that additional files will be released on a rolling basis. Assistant to the Secretary of War for Public Affairs and Chief Pentagon Spokesman Sean Parnell is named as the source of the statement.

de.title: Das Kriegsministerium veröffentlicht die zweite Veröffentlichung von Dateien zu nicht identifizierten anomalen Phänomenen auf WAR.GOV/UFO
de.summary: Das Kriegsministerium gibt bekannt, dass es die zweite Veröffentlichung freigegebener und historischer Dateien zu nicht identifizierten anomalen Phänomenen als Teil des Presidential Unsealing and Reporting System for UAP Encounters (PURSUE) veröffentlicht. In der Pressemitteilung heißt es, dass die Sammlung weiterhin auf WAR.GOV/UFO gespeichert bleibt und dass weitere Dateien fortlaufend veröffentlicht werden. Als Quelle der Aussage wird der Assistent des Kriegsministers für öffentliche Angelegenheiten und Chefsprecher des Pentagons, Sean Parnell, genannt.

articles.title: Sleeping Dog Documentary Exposes UAP Secrets And Risks
articles.summary: "Sleeping Dog," a documentary directed by Michael Lazovsky, premiered in select theaters on May 8, 2026, and was released digitally on May 12, 2026, focusing on the human cost and societal implications of pursuing UAP (UFO) disclosure. The film follows journalist Jeremy Corbell, who gained national attention after releasing military‑filmed footage of UAP swarms around the USS Omaha and USS Russell in 2019, footage later confirmed by the Department of Defense as authentic UAP footage. Corbell describes intense pressure from intelligence agencies, including a warning not to “kick a sleeping dog,” and recounts protecting whistleblowers by disguising them in his crew to shield their identities. The documentary also features testimony from former intelligence official David Grusch, who said Congress was informed that the government possessed recovered “biologics” linked to UAP programs, and from former Marine Michael Herrera, who claims he encountered a 300‑foot UFO in 2009 and was forced to sign a non‑disclosure agreement. Corbell and Lazovsky highlight that only a limited group of people, even presidents, may be fully informed about UAP technology, comparing the secrecy to nuclear programs and noting that some classified programs require denial even to Congress. The film portrays the emotional toll on Corbell and others, with Lazovsky recording contingency footage in case of harm, and concludes that the story is about journalism, freedom of speech, and the need for transparency, while acknowledging that the true origins of the objects remain contested.

en.title: Sleeping Dog Documentary Exposes UAP Secrets And Risks
en.summary: "Sleeping Dog," a documentary directed by Michael Lazovsky, premiered in select theaters on May 8, 2026, and was released digitally on May 12, 2026, focusing on the human cost and societal implications of pursuing UAP (UFO) disclosure. The film follows journalist Jeremy Corbell, who gained national attention after releasing military‑filmed footage of UAP swarms around the USS Omaha and USS Russell in 2019, footage later confirmed by the Department of Defense as authentic UAP footage.

de.title: Dokumentarfilm „Sleeping Dog“ enthüllt UAP-Geheimnisse und -Risiken
de.summary: „Sleeping Dog“, ein Dokumentarfilm unter der Regie von Michael Lazovsky, wurde am 8. Mai 2026 in ausgewählten Kinos uraufgeführt und am 12. Mai 2026 digital veröffentlicht. Er konzentriert sich auf die menschlichen Kosten und die gesellschaftlichen Auswirkungen der Offenlegung von UAP (UFO). Der Film folgt dem Journalisten Jeremy Corbell, der landesweite Aufmerksamkeit erlangte, nachdem er 2019 vom Militär gefilmtes Filmmaterial von UAP-Schwärmen rund um die USS Omaha und USS Russell veröffentlicht hatte, das später vom Verteidigungsministerium als authentisches UAP-Filmmaterial bestätigt wurde.

en.summary: Hal Puthoff, a former CIA‑funded physicist, claimed on a podcast that the United States may have recovered four distinct alien species from crashed UFOs, though he has not seen the evidence himself. His remarks echo earlier testimony by former Air Force intelligence officer David Grusch, who said the U.S. possessed “non‑human biologics” from unidentified anomalous phenomena crash sites.

de.title: Ehemaliger mit dem Pentagon verbundener Physiker behauptet, die Vereinigten Staaten hätten biologische Überreste von vier Arten außerirdischer Lebensformen geborgen
de.summary: Hal Puthoff, ein ehemaliger von der CIA finanzierter Physiker, behauptete in einem Podcast, dass die Vereinigten Staaten möglicherweise vier verschiedene außerirdische Arten aus abgestürzten UFOs geborgen hätten, obwohl er die Beweise selbst nicht gesehen hat. Seine Äußerungen spiegeln frühere Aussagen des ehemaligen Geheimdienstoffiziers der Luftwaffe, David Grusch, wider, der sagte, die USA besäßen „nichtmenschliche Biologika“ von nicht identifizierten Absturzstellen mit anomalen Phänomenen.

en.title: Department of War Publishes Second Release of Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena Files on WAR.GOV/UFO
en.summary: The Department of War says it is publishing the second release of declassified and historical Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena files as part of the Presidential Unsealing and Reporting System for UAP Encounters, or PURSUE. The release states that the collection remains housed on WAR.GOV/UFO and that additional files will be released on a rolling basis. Assistant to the Secretary of War for Public Affairs and Chief Pentagon Spokesman Sean Parnell is named as the source of the statement.

de.title: Das Kriegsministerium veröffentlicht die zweite Veröffentlichung von Dateien zu nicht identifizierten anomalen Phänomenen auf WAR.GOV/UFO
de.summary: Das Kriegsministerium gibt bekannt, dass es die zweite Veröffentlichung freigegebener und historischer Dateien zu nicht identifizierten anomalen Phänomenen als Teil des Presidential Unsealing and Reporting System for UAP Encounters (PURSUE) veröffentlicht. In der Pressemitteilung heißt es, dass die Sammlung weiterhin auf WAR.GOV/UFO gespeichert bleibt und dass weitere Dateien fortlaufend veröffentlicht werden. Als Quelle der Aussage wird der Assistent des Kriegsministers für öffentliche Angelegenheiten und Chefsprecher des Pentagons, Sean Parnell, genannt.

en.title: Sleeping Dog Documentary Exposes UAP Secrets And Risks
en.summary: "Sleeping Dog," a documentary directed by Michael Lazovsky, premiered in select theaters on May 8, 2026, and was released digitally on May 12, 2026, focusing on the human cost and societal implications of pursuing UAP (UFO) disclosure. The film follows journalist Jeremy Corbell, who gained national attention after releasing military‑filmed footage of UAP swarms around the USS Omaha and USS Russell in 2019, footage later confirmed by the Department of Defense as authentic UAP footage.

de.title: Dokumentarfilm „Sleeping Dog“ enthüllt UAP-Geheimnisse und -Risiken
de.summary: „Sleeping Dog“, ein Dokumentarfilm unter der Regie von Michael Lazovsky, wurde am 8. Mai 2026 in ausgewählten Kinos uraufgeführt und am 12. Mai 2026 digital veröffentlicht. Er konzentriert sich auf die menschlichen Kosten und die gesellschaftlichen Auswirkungen der Offenlegung von UAP (UFO). Der Film folgt dem Journalisten Jeremy Corbell, der landesweite Aufmerksamkeit erlangte, nachdem er 2019 vom Militär gefilmtes Filmmaterial von UAP-Schwärmen rund um die USS Omaha und USS Russell veröffentlicht hatte, das später vom Verteidigungsministerium als authentisches UAP-Filmmaterial bestätigt wurde.

translationMeta.summary: compact app translation only; source summaries are not overwritten
